query: SELECT UPPER(m.lineDescription) as d, COUNT(*) as c FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND m.inventoryItemId IS NULL GROUP BY d ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 30 OFFSET 40;
